debug_info.goal:
S : Type u_1
n : ℕ
i : Fin n
f : Fin n → RelIO S
⊢ PortMap.getIO (@Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelIO.liftFinf (RelIO S) n f) { inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑i } = f i

failed_attempts:
simp only [List.toAssocList_toList, List.map_map, Function.comp]
        have h : i ∈ fin_range n := fin_in_fin_range n i
        induction (fin_range n) with
        | nil => simp at h
        | cons hd tl ih =>
          simp only [List.map_cons, AssocList.find?]
          by_cases heq : ({ inst := InstIdent.top, name := hd.val } : InternalPort Nat) == { inst := InstIdent.top, name := i.val }
          · simp only [heq, cond_true]
            simp only [beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.mk.injEq, and_true] at heq
            congr 1
            exact Fin.ext heq.symm
          · simp only [heq, cond_false]
            apply ih
            simp only [List.mem_cons] at h
            cases h with
            | inl h => simp only [beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.mk.injEq, and_true, h] at heq
            | inr h => exact h

simp only [AssocList.find?_toAssocList, List.find?_map]
        congr 1
        rw [List.find?_eq_some]
        refine ⟨fin_in_fin_range n i, ?_⟩
        intro j _ hj
        simp only [beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.mk.injEq, true_and] at hj
        exact Fin.ext (Nat.cast_injective hj)

simp only [List.toList_toAssocList, AssocList.find?_toAssocList, List.find?_map,
                   Option.map_eq_map]
        congr 1
        rw [List.find?_eq_some]
        refine ⟨fin_in_fin_range n i, ?_⟩
        simp [beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.ext_iff]

simp only [List.toAssocList, AssocList.find?_eq, List.find?_map]
      have hmem : i ∈ fin_range n := fin_in_fin_range n i
      induction fin_range n with
      | nil => exact (List.not_mem_nil i hmem).elim
      | cons hd tl ih =>
        simp only [List.map_cons, List.find?_cons]
        by_cases h : i = hd
        · simp only [h, decide_eq_true_eq, ↓reduceIte]
        · simp only [List.mem_cons] at hmem
          have hmem' : i ∈ tl := hmem.resolve_left (fun heq => h heq.symm)
          simp only [ne_eq, h, not_false_eq_true, decide_eq_false_iff_not, ↓reduceIte]
          exact ih hmem'

simp only [List.toAssocList, AssocList.find?_toList]
        have h : i ∈ fin_range n := fin_in_fin_range n i
        induction (fin_range n) with
        | nil => simp at h
        | cons hd tl ih =>
          simp only [List.map_cons, List.find?_cons]
          by_cases heq : { inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑(Fin.toNat hd) } = { inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑i }
          · simp only [heq, ↓reduceIte]
            simp only [InternalPort.mk.injEq, and_true] at heq
            have : hd = i := by ext; omega
            subst this
            rfl
          · simp only [heq, ↓reduceIte]
            simp at h
            cases h with
            | inl hl => 
              exfalso
              apply heq
              congr
              simp [hl]
            | inr hr =>
              exact ih hr

some i := by
          apply List.find?_eq_some.mpr
          constructor
          · exact fin_in_fin_range n i
          · simp only [decide_eq_true_eq]
        simp only [h, Option.map_some', Option.getD_some]

simp only [List.toAssocList_toList, List.map_map]
        have hmem : i ∈ fin_range n := fin_in_fin_range n i
        induction hl : fin_range n with
        | nil => simp_all
        | cons hd tl ih =>
          simp only [List.map_cons, AssocList.find?]
          split
          · next heq =>
            simp only [beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.mk.injEq, and_true] at heq
            have : hd = i := Fin.ext (Nat.cast_injective heq)
            simp [this]
          · next hne =>
            apply ih
            cases hmem with
            | head => 
              simp only [beq_self_eq_true, not_true_eq_false] at hne
            | tail _ h => exact h

simp only [liftFinf, PortMap.getIO, AssocList.getIO]
        have := fin_in_fin_range n i
        induction hl : fin_range n generalizing f with
        | nil => simp_all [fin_range_len]
        | cons hd tl ih =>
          simp only [List.map_cons, List.toAssocList_cons, AssocList.find?]
          by_cases h : i = hd
          · simp [h, beq_iff_eq]
          · simp only [beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.mk.injEq, Fin.val_inj, h, and_true, ↓reduceIte]
            simp_all [List.mem_cons]

some i := by
          apply List.find?_eq_some.mpr
          refine ⟨fin_in_fin_range n i, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simp
          · intro j _ hji
            simp only [beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.mk.injEq, true_and] at hji
            exact Fin.val_injective hji
        simp only [h, Option.map_some']

simp only [AssocList.find?_toAssocList, List.find?_map, Option.map_eq_some_iff]
        use i
        constructor
        · rw [List.find?_eq_some_iff]
          refine ⟨fin_in_fin_range n i, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simp [beq_iff_eq]
          · intro y _ h
            simp [beq_iff_eq] at h
            exact h
        · rfl

simp only [List.toAssocList, AssocList.find?_toList]
        have h : (i : Fin n) ∈ fin_range n := fin_in_fin_range n i
        induction (fin_range n) with
        | nil => simp at h
        | cons hd tl ih =>
          simp only [List.map_cons, List.find?_cons]
          by_cases heq : hd = i
          · subst heq
            simp
          · simp only [heq, ↓reduceIte]
            simp at h
            cases h with
            | inl h => exact absurd h heq
            | inr h => exact ih h

simp only [liftFinf, PortMap.getIO, List.toAssocList, AssocList.findD_eq, List.find?_map]
      have := fin_in_fin_range n i
      induction (fin_range n) with
      | nil => simp_all
      | cons hd tl ih =>
        simp only [List.find?_cons, List.mem_cons] at *
        split
        · rename_i h
          simp only [InternalPort.mk.injEq, and_true, beq_eq_true_iff_eq] at h
          simp only [Option.map_some', Option.getD_some]
          congr; exact Fin.ext h
        · cases this with
          | inl h => 
            rename_i h'
            simp only [InternalPort.mk.injEq, and_true, bne_iff_ne, ne_eq, beq_eq_true_iff_eq] at h'
            exact absurd (congrArg Fin.val h.symm) h'
          | inr h => exact ih h

simp only [List.toAssocList]
        have h : i ∈ fin_range n := fin_in_fin_range n i
        induction (fin_range n) with
        | nil => simp at h
        | cons hd tl ih =>
          simp only [List.map_cons, AssocList.find?]
          by_cases heq : hd = i
          · simp only [heq, beq_self_eq_true, ↓reduceIte]
          · simp only [show (⟨⟨InstIdent.top, hd.val⟩, f hd⟩.1 == ⟨InstIdent.top, i.val⟩) = false by
              simp only [beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.mk.injEq, and_true]
              intro h; apply heq; ext; exact h, ↓reduceIte]
            apply ih
            simp only [List.mem_cons] at h
            exact h.resolve_left heq

some ({ inst := InstIdent.top, name := ↑i }, f i) := by
          rw [List.find?_map]
          simp only [List.find?_eq_some, fin_in_fin_range, beq_iff_eq, InternalPort.mk.injEq, true_and]
          refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
          · rfl
          · intro y _ hy
            have : y.toNat = i.toNat := Nat.cast_injective hy
            exact Fin.ext this
        simp only [this, Option.map_some']

some (f i) := by
          have mem : i ∈ fin_range n := fin_in_fin_range n i
          induction fin_range n with
          | nil => simp at mem
          | cons hd tl ih =>
            simp only [List.map_cons, List.toAssocList_cons, AssocList.find?_cons]
            by_cases heq : (↑hd.val : InternalPort Nat) = ⟨InstIdent.top, ↑i.val⟩
            · simp only [heq, beq_self_eq_true, ↓reduceIte]
              have : hd = i := by
                simp only [InternalPort.mk.injEq, true_and] at heq
                exact Fin.ext (Nat.cast_injective heq)
              simp [this]
            · simp only [bne_iff_ne, ne_eq, heq, not_false_eq_true, ↓reduceIte]
              apply ih
              simp only [List.mem_cons] at mem
              cases mem with
              | inl h => exfalso; apply heq; simp [h]
              | inr h => exact h
        simp only [h, Option.getD_some]
